title: Pre-Ecolier Practice Set 19 - Patterns and Counting
disclaimer: Original practice problems inspired by Math Kangaroo format. Not official competition questions.

questions.question_text: What number comes next in the pattern: 2, 4, 6, 8, ?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 200 50' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><text x='10' y='35' font-size='22' fill='currentColor'>2, 4, 6, 8, ?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Number sequence 2, 4, 6, 8, question mark.
questions.solution: The pattern adds 2 each time, so after 8 comes 10.

questions.question_text: A farmer groups eggs into cartons of 6. How many cartons does he need for 18 eggs?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 240 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='5' y='10' width='70' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='85' y='10' width='70' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='165' y='10' width='70' height='40' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Three rectangular cartons side by side.
questions.solution: 18 divided by 6 equals 3 cartons.

questions.question_text: Fill in the missing number: 10, 20, __, 40, 50.
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 240 50' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><text x='10' y='35' font-size='20' fill='currentColor'>10, 20, __, 40, 50</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Sequence with a blank between 20 and 40.
questions.solution: Each term increases by 10, so the missing number is 30.

questions.question_text: A tally chart shows four bundles of five and two extra marks. How many items were counted?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 260 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><text x='10' y='35' font-size='22' fill='currentColor'>|||| |||| |||| |||| ||</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Four groups of five tally marks followed by two single marks.
questions.solution: Four fives equals 20, plus 2 extras equals 22.

questions.question_text: In the pattern cat, dog, cat, dog, cat, what comes next?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 260 40' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><text x='10' y='28' font-size='18' fill='currentColor'>cat, dog, cat, dog, cat, ?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Alternating words cat and dog.
questions.solution: The pattern alternates cat and dog; after cat comes dog.

questions.question_text: Mia is 4th in line and Leo is 7th. How many children are between them?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 280 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><circle cx='30' cy='30' r='15' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='70' cy='30' r='15' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='110' cy='30' r='15' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='150' cy='30' r='15' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='190' cy='30' r='15' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='230' cy='30' r='15' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='270' cy='30' r='15' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Seven circles representing children in a line.
questions.solution: Positions 5 and 6 are between 4th and 7th, so 2 children.

questions.question_text: What comes next: 1, 3, 5, 7, ?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 200 50' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><text x='10' y='35' font-size='22' fill='currentColor'>1, 3, 5, 7, ?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Odd numbers 1, 3, 5, 7, question mark.
questions.solution: Odd numbers increase by 2; after 7 comes 9.

questions.question_text: Tim has 15 crayons. He puts them in boxes of 5. How many boxes does he fill?
questions.solution: 15 divided by 5 equals 3 boxes.

questions.question_text: Find the missing number: 3, 6, 9, __, 15.
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 220 50' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><text x='10' y='35' font-size='20' fill='currentColor'>3, 6, 9, __, 15</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Sequence counting by 3 with a blank.
questions.solution: Each term adds 3, so after 9 comes 12.

questions.question_text: In a survey, apples got three bundles of five and three extras. How many votes for apples?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 260 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><text x='10' y='35' font-size='22' fill='currentColor'>|||| |||| |||| |||</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Three bundles of five tally marks plus three single marks.
questions.solution: Three fives equal 15, plus 3 equals 18 votes.

questions.question_text: A pattern goes sun, moon, moon, sun, moon, moon. What is the 8th item?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 320 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><text x='10' y='38' font-size='16' fill='currentColor'>sun, moon, moon, sun, moon, moon, sun, ?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Repeating pattern of sun and two moons.
questions.solution: The pattern repeats in groups of 3. Item 7 is sun, so item 8 is moon.

questions.question_text: Eight friends stand in line. Kate is 3rd from the front. What position is she from the back?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 340 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='10' y='15' width='30' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='50' y='15' width='30' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='90' y='15' width='30' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='130' y='15' width='30' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='170' y='15' width='30' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='210' y='15' width='30' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='250' y='15' width='30' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='290' y='15' width='30' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Eight squares in a row representing a line of friends.
questions.solution: From the back, Kate's position is 8 minus 3 plus 1 equals 6th.

questions.question_text: What comes next: 1, 4, 7, 10, ?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 220 50' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><text x='10' y='35' font-size='20' fill='currentColor'>1, 4, 7, 10, ?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Sequence counting by 3.
questions.solution: The pattern adds 3 each time; after 10 comes 13.

questions.question_text: There are 24 cookies to share equally among 4 plates. How many cookies on each plate?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 260 80' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><circle cx='40' cy='40' r='25' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='100' cy='40' r='25' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='160' cy='40' r='25' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='220' cy='40' r='25' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Four plates drawn as circles.
questions.solution: 24 divided by 4 equals 6 cookies per plate.

questions.question_text: Find the missing value: 20, 17, 14, __, 8.
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 240 50' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><text x='10' y='35' font-size='20' fill='currentColor'>20, 17, 14, __, 8</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Decreasing sequence with missing term.
questions.solution: Each term decreases by 3, so after 14 comes 11.

questions.question_text: Pears received five bundles of five tally marks and one extra. How many votes?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 320 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><text x='10' y='35' font-size='20' fill='currentColor'>|||| |||| |||| |||| |||| |</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Five groups of five tally marks and one extra.
questions.solution: Five fives equal 25, plus 1 equals 26 votes.

questions.question_text: A row of beads follows the pattern red, red, blue, red, red, blue. What color is the 10th bead?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 360 50' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><circle cx='20' cy='25' r='12' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='50' cy='25' r='12' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='80' cy='25' r='12' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='110' cy='25' r='12' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='140' cy='25' r='12' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><circle cx='170' cy='25' r='12' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Row of beads showing the pattern.
questions.solution: The pattern has period 3. 10 divided by 3 has remainder 1, so the 10th bead matches the 1st: red.

questions.question_text: In a line of 10 kids, Rita is 4th from the front. How many kids are behind her?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 420 50' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='10' y='10' width='30' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='50' y='10' width='30' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='90' y='10' width='30' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='130' y='10' width='30' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='170' y='10' width='30' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='210' y='10' width='30' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='250' y='10' width='30' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='290' y='10' width='30' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='330' y='10' width='30' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='370' y='10' width='30' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Ten squares in a row representing the line.
questions.solution: Kids behind Rita are positions 5 to 10, which is 6 kids.

questions.question_text: What comes next: 50, 45, 40, 35, ?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 260 50' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><text x='10' y='35' font-size='20' fill='currentColor'>50, 45, 40, 35, ?</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Decreasing sequence by 5.
questions.solution: Each term decreases by 5, so after 35 comes 30.

questions.question_text: A teacher puts 28 pencils into bundles of 7. How many bundles does she make?
questions.solution: 28 divided by 7 equals 4 bundles.

questions.question_text: A doubling pattern goes 1, 2, 4, __, 16. What is the missing number?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 240 50' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><text x='10' y='35' font-size='20' fill='currentColor'>1, 2, 4, __, 16</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Doubling sequence with a blank.
questions.solution: Each term doubles, so after 4 comes 8.

questions.question_text: A chart shows six bundles of five. How many items total?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 340 60' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><text x='10' y='38' font-size='20' fill='currentColor'>|||| |||| |||| |||| |||| ||||</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Six bundles of five tally marks.
questions.solution: Six fives equal 30 items.

questions.question_text: The pattern is A, B, C, A, B, C, A. What is the 12th letter?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 300 50' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><text x='10' y='35' font-size='20' fill='currentColor'>A, B, C, A, B, C, A, ...</text></svg>
questions.image_description: Repeating letter pattern of period 3.
questions.solution: Period is 3 and 12 divided by 3 has remainder 0, so the 12th letter is C.

questions.question_text: Nine runners cross the finish line. Leo finishes after 5 runners and before 3 runners. What place did Leo take?
questions.image_svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 380 50' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><rect x='10' y='10' width='35' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='55' y='10' width='35' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='100' y='10' width='35' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='145' y='10' width='35' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='190' y='10' width='35' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='235' y='10' width='35' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='280' y='10' width='35' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/><rect x='325' y='10' width='35' height='30' fill='#f0f0f0' stroke='currentColor'/></svg>
questions.image_description: Row of boxes representing the finishers.
questions.solution: Five runners finished before Leo, so Leo is 6th. Three finish after, giving a total of 9.
